title: vitis lanceolaria var. assimilis
intro: Vitis lanceolaria var. assimilis, also known as the Australian grape or native grape, is a variety of grapevine native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine, where its medicinal properties include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support digestive health. Vitis lanceolaria var. assimilis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use.
